creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Team added to repository, with write permission. There are currently two members (you and one other).

Note:

Existing team maintainer (the user that created the team) will need to handover 'maintainer' team role to appropriate secteam lead, or other contact that is authorized to manage secteam membership. 

If you need us to do this, please reply to existing bugmeister email thread and we'll take care of that out of band
